hero.headline: Your slow or broken site is costing you clients. I fix it.
hero.subtitle: Free 15-minute audit. I review your site, tell you what's wrong, and how much it costs to fix. No strings attached.

services.title: Services
services.intro: Three ways to solve real problems. No packages, no fluff.

items.name: Technical Audit + Fix
items.short: I review your site, find what's making it slow or insecure, and fix it.
items.description: Ideal if your site works but something feels off: it's slow, has errors, went down, fails speed tests. I run a full diagnostic and apply the necessary fixes. You get a report of what I did and why.
includes: Final report with actions and recommendations
items.for: Businesses with WordPress or similar sites needing technical fixes without a full redesign.

items.name: WordPress Migration
items.short: Your current site is too bloated or hard to maintain. I move it to lighter, faster technology.
items.description: If your WordPress has too many plugins, bloated themes, or was hacked, migrating to a modern stack (Astro, static HTML, or a lightweight setup) can reduce hosting costs, improve speed, and eliminate most vulnerabilities. I analyze your site, recommend the best option, and execute the migration.
items.for: Businesses with bloated, slow or vulnerable WordPress wanting something faster and easier to maintain.

items.name: Website from Scratch
items.short: You don't have a site or your current one no longer works. I build it from strategy to launch.
items.description: Complete design and development of corporate sites, landing pages, or service websites. Includes content structure, visual design, development, and launch. Built with Astro, modern HTML/CSS, and tools that guarantee speed and low maintenance.
items.for: Businesses, professionals, or startups needing web presence from scratch without depending on WordPress.

results.title: Real results
results.intro: Projects where I solved concrete problems — not where I made pretty things.

items.problem: Their site hadn't had a real overhaul in 8 years. Sections added without criteria. Confusing navigation. Diluted brand. Competing against Neubox and Xpress but their site didn't reflect it.
items.result: Complete site restructuring, new visual identity, improved information architecture. The site went from a cluttered catalog to a clear IT services platform. The company expanded into cybersecurity and AI with a solid visual foundation.
items.metrics: Full redesign with estimated 40-60% improvement in perceived navigation speed. Reduction in support tickets due to user confusion.

items.problem: Inconsistent visual communication across presentations, mobile app, print manuals and web. Each department used different formats. No unified visual criteria.
items.result: Modular design system working across presentations, app, manuals and web. Reusable templates anyone on the team can use without design knowledge.
items.metrics: Estimated 50% reduction in material production time thanks to templates. Visual consistency achieved across all channels.

items.problem: They had quality courses but their visual presence didn't communicate professionalism. Needed to convey academic credibility without appearing rigid. Students dropped off before enrolling due to visual distrust.
items.result: Complete identity system with a color palette balancing authority and approachability. Improved information hierarchy for courses. Professional visual presence reflecting content quality.
items.metrics: Brand perception improvement. Scalable color system for new courses and materials. Estimated reduction in course page drop-off due to visual clarity.

about.title: About
about.headline: Designer who also codes. Not the other way around.
about.body1: I'm César Fernando. I started in design in 2007. Since then I've worked with companies, startups and teams in Mexico, Europe and the US. I've done branding, web design, UX/UI and visual systems.
about.body2: In recent years I started studying software. Not to switch careers. To close the gap between designing something and making sure it works well, loads fast, and is easy to maintain.
about.body3: Today I can audit your site, find what's making it slow, fix it, and if needed, rebuild it with lighter technology. All with visual judgment and without selling you hype.
about.body4: I'm not an agency. I'm not a NASA senior engineer. I'm someone who understands how a site looks and how it works, and tells you the truth about what your project needs.
about.tools: Astro, HTML/CSS, React, Node.js, Python, Figma, Git. I use AI as an acceleration tool, not as a replacement for judgment.

stages.name: Diagnosis
stages.desc: I review your current site or your needs. I detect speed, security, usability or structure issues. I tell you what I find and what can be done.
stages.client: You tell me what worries you about your site. I review and give you a clear diagnosis.

stages.name: Proposal
stages.desc: I present what needs to be done, how much it costs, and how long it takes. No surprises. No fine print.
stages.client: You review the proposal, ask questions, and decide if we move forward.

stages.name: Build
stages.desc: Design, development, migration or fixes as agreed. I keep you updated on progress. I test before delivering.
stages.client: You see progress, test, request adjustments if something doesn't work for you.

stages.name: Delivery
stages.desc: I deliver your working site with clear documentation. I explain how to maintain it or we arrange periodic follow-up.
stages.client: You receive your ready site with clear instructions. If you need later adjustments, we handle them.

contact.title: Let's start?
contact.intro: You don't need a perfect brief. Send me an email with what worries you about your site and I'll review it. The first 15-minute audit is free.

okhosting.title: OK Hosting
okhosting.tagline: From hosting provider to technology brand
okhosting.problem: OK Hosting was perceived as a commodity hosting provider. It needed to reposition as a technology company offering hosting, software, IT management, cybersecurity and AI.
okhosting.system: Complete rebranding: new brand identity, website design, UX/UI process. Competitive benchmark, user personas, restructured information architecture.
okhosting.result: A memorable identity positioning OK Hosting as a full-spectrum technology company. Clear foundation for future service expansion.
okhosting.approach: Competitive benchmark, user personas, reorganized architecture, bold new visual identity.
okhosting.learnings: Rebranding a legacy company requires aligning internal stakeholders before touching design.

firstchoice.title: 1st Choice CE
firstchoice.problem: Education platform needed visual credibility and market differentiation.
firstchoice.system: Complete identity system, professional color palette, clear hierarchy for course materials.
firstchoice.result: Brand perception improvement. Scalable system for new courses.
firstchoice.approach: Color system for clear information hierarchy.
firstchoice.learnings: Education brands need to balance academic seriousness with warmth.

caintra.title: Caintra Nuevo León
caintra.problem: Inconsistent visual communication across digital and print formats.
caintra.system: Modular system: slides, app, manuals, web with reusable templates.
caintra.result: Estimated 50% reduction in material production time. Cross-channel visual consistency.
caintra.learnings: B2B design requires restraint and clear systems for non-designers.
